turns.text: What is your refund policy? How long do I have to return an item?

notes: Clear in-scope question with strong KB match. Should resolve directly.

turns.text: How long does standard shipping take? I placed an order 3 days ago.

notes: Straightforward shipping FAQ. Evidence should ground confidently.

turns.text: I forgot my password and the reset email isn't arriving. What should I do?

notes: Account access topic is well-covered in KB.

turns.text: My order hasn't arrived. It's been two weeks.
I already contacted you about this and nobody helped me. This is really frustrating!
This is the THIRD time I've reached out. Still nothing. I want my money back NOW!

notes: Escalation through frustration buildup and repetition. Should trigger by turn 2 or 3.

turns.text: Your service is absolutely terrible. I've been waiting weeks for a response.
I want to speak to a manager immediately. This is unacceptable and I'm filing a complaint.

notes: High frustration signals from the start. Should escalate quickly.

turns.text: I was charged twice for my subscription this month.
I already tried disputing this through my bank but they said to contact you first.
Still no resolution. I've contacted you three times now about the same charge. This is going in circles.

notes: Billing dispute with repetition and effort signals.

turns.text: I need help with my thing

notes: Too vague to ground. Should ask for clarification.

turns.text: The thing I bought doesn't work right. Can you fix it?

notes: No product details, no order number. Needs clarification before proceeding.

turns.text: Can you help me write a cover letter for a job application?

notes: Completely outside support scope. Should refuse safely, not escalate.

turns.text: How do I integrate your API with my Salesforce instance? I need the webhook endpoint format.

notes: In-scope (product question) but not in KB. Low confidence should trigger escalation, not refusal.
